items.title: Glasner considered for AC Milan job - Sunday's gossip
items.summary: Oliver Glasner considered for AC Milan job, while Liverpool negotiate with Inter Milan on a price for Curtis Jones, plus more.

items.title: ‘I don’t know why’ – Thierry Henry questions Arsenal’s decision for Gabriel to take crunch penalty… as Arteta explains
items.summary: THIERRY HENRY has questioned why Gabriel took Arsenal's fifth penalty against Paris Saint-Germain. The Brazilian missed the crucial spot kick that saw PSG run out winners to retain their European crown. items.title: 'He wanted to take it' - Gabriel's first Arsenal penalty ends with heartbreak
items.summary: Gabriel's first penalty for Arsenal ends in heartache as his shootout miss hands Paris St-Germain a second successive Champions League title.

items.title: Arsenal 'pain' will fuel fire after Champions League heartbreak
items.summary: On Sunday, Arsenal will get on an open bus parade to celebrate their Premier League title less than 24 hours after their Champions League final heartbreak.

items.title: Decision not to award Arsenal penalty correct - analysis
items.summary: Champions League analysts Nedum Onuoha and Pat Nevin both feel the decision to not award Arsenal a penalty in extra-time of the Champions League final against PSG was the correct one.

items.title: How Kvaratskhelia shook off Arsenal shackles in second half
items.summary: Champions League analysts Nedum Onuoha and Pat Nevin look at how Khvicha Kvaratskhelia was able to beat Arsenal's plan to stifle him to become influential in the second half of the Champions League final.
